narrative:
Miamisburg 2-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 867 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a clear Republican lean of 9.9 percentage points.
